title: Eternal Eclipse
description: Eternal Eclipse traps the world in endless twilight. Survive harsh seasons, explore cursed dimensions, battle dangerous mobs, and master magic to reclaim the light and end the darkness.
body:
The sun has vanished, and the world is trapped in endless twilight. Eternal Eclipse is a survival-fantasy modpack focused on atmosphere, challenge, and progression.

Survival Mechanics – Tough As Nails adds thirst and body temperature, forcing you to prepare for every journey. Serene Seasons keeps the world changing even without the sun.

Exploration – Venture into new realms with Twilight Forest, survive the reworked Nether and End, and encounter dangerous mobs from Alex’s Mobs and Mowzie’s Mobs.

Magic & Progression – Master light and darkness with Botania and Blood Magic. Unlock powerful abilities and items to push back the eternal night.

Immersion & Atmosphere – Dynamic Lights makes torches and lamps your lifeline, while dark landscapes create a constant sense of danger.
